title: Recycling Depot Route Ledger: Maximal-Independence Sign Matrix
strategies: triangular reference completion: fill free cells with the lower-triangular +/-1 sign pattern (the checker's own baseline)
deterministic hill-climb: from the triangular completion, flip free cells in row-major order whenever |det| strictly increases
seeded multi-restart randomized hill-climb: explore several random +/-1 completions and local flips under a bounded evaluation budget, keep the largest exact |det|
structured near-orthogonal constructions (conference/Toeplitz-style sign patterns) adapted to honor the pre-committed cells
